summary_en: With Google Beam, see and hear colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.

why_it_matters_en: This experiment leverages image and audio technologies to enhance the immersion of remote meetings, improving team collaboration efficiency.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A New Experiment Brings Better Group Meetings to Google Beam. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 专业化胜过规模：大多数AI采购决策忽视的战略变量
title_en: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
summary_zh: Hugging Face博客指出，在AI采购决策中，专业化比规模更重要，是一个经常被忽视的战略因素。
summary_en: The Hugging Face blog highlights that in AI procurement decisions, specialization is more important than scale and is a strategic variable often overlooked.
why_it_matters_zh: 理解专业化的重要性，能够帮助企业做出更精准的AI采购选择，从而提升效率和效果。
why_it_matters_en: Recognizing the importance of specialization helps organizations make more precise AI procurement choices, enhancing efficiency and outcomes.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: SOLAR：一种用于终身学习和持续适应的自我优化开放式自主代理
title_en: SOLAR: A Self-Optimizing Open-Ended Autonomous Agent for Lifelong Learning and Continual Adaptation
summary_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）取得了显著成功，但在动态实际环境中部署时仍面临概念漂移和基于梯度的适应高成本等瓶颈。传统微调难以适应非静态数据流，且容易遗忘或需大量手动数据整理。为解决这些问题，提出了自我优化终身自主推理器（SOLAR）。SOLAR作为一个开放式自主代理，利用参数级元学习自我提升，将模型权重视为探索环境。它通过建立常识知识的强先验，有效支持迁移学习。结合多层次强化学习，SOLAR自动发现适应策略，实现对未见领域的高效测试时适应。关键在于维护一个不断演变的有效修改策略知识库，作为情节记忆缓冲以平衡适应性与稳定性。实验表明，SOLAR在常识、数学、医疗、编码、社交及逻辑推理任务上优于强基线，推动了终身适应自主代理的发展。
summary_en: Despite the success of large language models, deploying them in dynamic real-world settings faces challenges like concept drift and costly gradient-based adaptation. Traditional fine-tuning struggles with non-stationary data streams, leading to catastrophic forgetting or heavy manual data curation. To overcome these, SOLAR (Self-Optimizing Lifelong Autonomous Reasoner) is proposed as an open-ended autonomous agent leveraging parameter-level meta-learning to self-improve, treating model weights as an environment for exploration. It consolidates a strong prior of common-sense knowledge for transfer learning, uses multi-level reinforcement learning to autonomously discover adaptation strategies for efficient test-time adaptation to unseen domains, and maintains an evolving knowledge base of valid modification strategies acting as an episodic memory buffer balancing plasticity and stability. Experiments show SOLAR outperforms strong baselines across various reasoning tasks, advancing lifelong adaptation in autonomous agents.
why_it_matters_zh: SOLAR通过自我优化和元学习策略，有效解决了传统微调在动态环境中适应困难和遗忘的问题，推动了自主代理在复杂、变化环境中的持续学习和能力提升。
why_it_matters_en: SOLAR effectively addresses the adaptation and forgetting challenges of traditional fine-tuning in dynamic environments through self-optimization and meta-learning, advancing autonomous agents' continual learning and capability enhancement in complex, evolving settings.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: SOLAR: A Self-Optimizing Open-Ended Autonomous Agent for Lifelong Learning and Continual Adaptation. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 面向闭环优化、仿真与建模编排的工具增强代理
title_en: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization, Simulation, and Modeling Orchestration
summary_zh: 该论文提出COSMO-Agent框架，一种工具增强的强化学习方法，旨在解决CAD与CAE之间的语义差距，实现闭环的设计-仿真-优化过程。通过将CAD生成、CAE求解、结果解析和几何修正视为交互式强化学习环境，使大语言模型能够协同外部工具，反复修正几何参数直至满足约束条件。该方法设计了多约束奖励机制，提升了学习的稳定性和工业适用性，并提供涵盖25种组件类别的工业数据集支持训练与评价。实验结果表明，COSMO-Agent显著提升了小型开源大语言模型在约束驱动设计中的性能，优于大型及商业模型。
summary_en: The paper proposes COSMO-Agent, a tool-augmented reinforcement learning framework that bridges the CAD-CAE semantic gap to enable a closed-loop design, simulation, and optimization process. By modeling CAD generation, CAE solving, result parsing, and geometry revision as an interactive RL environment, it trains large language models to orchestrate external tools and iteratively adjust parametric geometries until constraints are met. A multi-constraint reward is designed for training stability and industrial applicability. The work also introduces an industry-aligned dataset with 25 component categories to support realistic training and evaluation. Experiments demonstrate COSMO-Agent substantially enhances small open-source LLMs for constraint-driven design, outperforming larger and commercial models in feasibility, efficiency, and stability.
why_it_matters_zh: 工业设计中的CAD与CAE工具集成存在语义鸿沟，限制了自动化闭环优化的实现。COSMO-Agent通过强化学习和多工具协同，解决了这一瓶颈，提高了设计的自动化和可靠性，为工程设计领域带来创新突破。
why_it_matters_en: Integrating CAD and CAE tools in industrial design faces a semantic gap that limits automated closed-loop optimization. COSMO-Agent addresses this bottleneck by reinforcement learning and multi-tool orchestration, enhancing automation and reliability of design processes, marking a significant advance in engineering design.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization, Simulation, and Modeling Orchestration. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OSCToM：基于强化学习的高阶心智理论对抗生成方法
title_en: OSCToM: RL-Guided Adversarial Generation for High-Order Theory of Mind
summary_zh: 大型语言模型在许多语言任务中表现出色，但其心智理论（ToM）推理在复杂社会环境中仍不稳定。现有基准测试如ExploreToM未完全涵盖递归信念和信息不对称等难点。本文提出OSCToM（观察者-自我冲突心智理论），通过强化学习、领域特定语言和组合替代模型生成观测者与自身信念冲突的嵌套信念冲突案例，支持多层递归推理。实验表明，OSCToM-8B在多个测试系统中表现最佳，在信息不对称的FANToM基准上准确率达76%，远超ExploreToM的0.2%，且数据合成效率提高6倍，说明针对性训练数据有助于小模型提升高级认知推理能力。项目代码公开。
summary_en: Large Language Models excel at many tasks but show uneven Theory of Mind reasoning in complex social contexts. Existing benchmarks like ExploreToM lack tests for recursive beliefs and information asymmetries. This paper introduces OSCToM (Observer-Self Conflict Theory of Mind), combining reinforcement learning, a domain-specific language, and compositional surrogate models to generate nested belief conflicts where an observer's view clashes with their own belief state, enabling deep recursive reasoning. Experiments demonstrate OSCToM-8B achieves top results, notably 76% accuracy on the information-asymmetric FANToM benchmark compared to ExploreToM's 0.2%, and offers 6x more data synthesis efficiency, suggesting targeted training data helps smaller models handle advanced cognitive reasoning. Code is available publicly.
why_it_matters_zh: OSCToM通过引入观测者与自我信念冲突的复杂案例，有效提升了模型在高阶心智理论任务中的推理能力，尤其在信息不对称环境下表现显著，为社会智能和认知推理研究提供了新方法和数据资源。
why_it_matters_en: OSCToM enhances models' reasoning in high-order Theory of Mind tasks by modeling observer-self belief conflicts, significantly improving performance in information-asymmetric scenarios, thereby advancing research in social intelligence and cognitive reasoning with novel methods and efficient data generation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OSCToM: RL-Guided Adversarial Generation for High-Order Theory of Mind. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: CR4T：基于重写的青少年大语言模型安全防护措施
title_en: CR4T: Rewrite-Based Guardrails for Adolescent LLM Safety
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）日益嵌入青少年数字环境中，支持信息搜索、建议提供及情感互动。然而现有安全机制多以成人为中心，通过拒绝型抑制来减少违规，但可能导致对话死角、限制建设性指导，无法满足青少年的发展性需求。本文提出了CR4T（青少年批评与修订）框架，一种模型无关的保护方法，通过选择性重写不安全或拒绝式输出为适龄、指导性回复，保留良性意图。CR4T结合轻量风险检测与领域条件重写，既减少风险内容又避免不必要的对话中断，实验验证了其有效性。此方法为面向青少年的LLM系统提供了更以人为本的替代方案。
summary_en: Large language models are increasingly integrated into adolescent digital environments, facilitating information seeking, advice, and sensitive interactions. Existing safety methods primarily focus on adult norms and rely on refusal-based suppression, which can cause conversational dead-ends and limit constructive guidance, not addressing adolescents' developmental vulnerabilities. The paper introduces CR4T—a model-agnostic safeguarding framework that rewrites unsafe or refusal-style outputs into age-appropriate, guidance-focused responses while preserving benign intent. Combining light risk detection and domain-specific rewriting, CR4T reduces risky content and unnecessary conversation shutdowns. Experiments show that targeted rewriting effectively decreases unsafe and refusal outputs, suggesting a more human-centered alternative for adolescent-facing LLM safety.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破传统拒绝式安全机制，针对青少年用户的特殊发展需求设计，避免了对话死角和非建设性回复，通过重写输出提升指导性和人性化，体现了面向青少年AI安全管理的新思路。
why_it_matters_en: This work moves beyond refusal-centric safety mechanisms by addressing adolescents' unique developmental needs, avoiding conversational dead-ends, and enhancing response guidance via rewrite-based interventions. It represents a novel, human-centered approach to adolescent AI safety management.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: CR4T: Rewrite-Based Guardrails for Adolescent LLM Safety. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 利用生成式人工智能拓宽交通安全数据访问：基于模式的空间自然语言查询框架
title_en: Broadening Access to Transportation Safety Data with Generative AI: A Schema-Grounded Framework for Spatial Natural Language Queries
summary_zh: 交通安全分析需要整合事故记录、道路属性和地理空间数据，传统基于GIS的工作流程在不同机构和社区利益相关者间存在访问不均的问题。技术门槛导致安全规划所需的分析工具难以为众多实践者所用，尤其是地方机构、学校委员会和居民，他们面对安全问题却缺乏检索、筛选、映射和分析相关数据的能力。本文提出了一种基于大型语言模型的模式指导自然语言界面，通过将用户查询转换为结构化语义框架，并通过规则校验后执行确定性空间操作，确保执行结果可复现且来源权威。该框架在马萨诸塞州整合的交通安全数据库中评估，所有查询均成功执行，验证层修改了29%的查询错误，显示灵活自然语言与严格模式规范间的差距。结果表明，自然语言的易用性与确定性执行相结合，是扩大交通安全数据访问的实用方向，对公共部门规划中可信AI具有重要意义。
summary_en: Transportation safety analysis involves integrating crash records, roadway attributes, and geospatial data, but access to such data is uneven across agencies and community stakeholders due to technical barriers. Local entities often lack the capacity to retrieve, filter, map, and analyze relevant data despite safety concerns. This paper introduces a schema-grounded natural language interface using a large language model to interpret user intent while ensuring deterministic and reviewable execution on an authoritative database. User queries are transformed into validated semantic frames compiled into spatial operations executed on a PostGIS database. Evaluated on a Massachusetts statewide transportation safety database, all queries succeeded, with the validation layer correcting 29% of errors, bridging the gap between flexible natural language and strict schema requirements. The approach suggests that combining natural language accessibility with deterministic execution is a practical way to broaden access to transportation safety data, with implications for trustworthy AI in public-sector planning.
why_it_matters_zh: 本研究通过结合生成式人工智能与模式指导机制，解决了交通安全分析中数据访问不均及技术门槛高的问题，使更多非专业用户能够有效查询和利用数据，促进公共安全规划的透明度和参与度。
why_it_matters_en: This study addresses the uneven access and high technical barriers in transportation safety data analysis by combining generative AI with schema-guided validation, enabling non-expert users to effectively query and use data, thereby enhancing transparency and engagement in public safety planning.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Broadening Access to Transportation Safety Data with Generative AI: A Schema-Grounded Framework for Spatial Natural Language Queries. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Sem-Detect：AI生成同行评审的语义层面检测
title_en: Sem-Detect: Semantic Level Detection of AI Generated Peer-Reviews
summary_zh: 本文提出了Sem-Detect，一种结合文本特征与语义层面论点分析的同行评审作者身份检测方法。该方法通过比较目标评审与多份针对同一论文的AI生成评审，利用AI模型趋同于相似观点而人类评审呈现更多独特多样观点的特点，成功区分完全由AI生成的评审与真实人类撰写的评审。实证结果显示，在ICLR和NeurIPS的两万多份评审数据集上，Sem-Detect在二分类任务中较最强基线的TPR@0.1% FPR提升了25.5%。此外，在三分类设置里，LLM精修的人类评审仍保持独特的语义信号，误判率低于3.5%。
summary_en: This paper introduces Sem-Detect, an authorship detection method for peer reviews that combines textual features with semantic-level claim analysis. By comparing a target review against multiple AI-generated reviews of the same paper, Sem-Detect leverages the tendency of AI models to converge on similar points while human reviewers add unique and diverse insights. The method effectively distinguishes fully AI-generated reviews from authentic human-written ones, including those refined using LLMs but retaining human judgment. Evaluated on over 20,000 peer reviews from ICLR and NeurIPS, Sem-Detect improves the strongest baseline by 25.5% in TPR@0.1% FPR for binary classification. Additionally, in a three-class scenario, LLM-refined human reviews maintain distinct semantic signals, with less than 3.5% misclassified as AI-generated.
why_it_matters_zh: 在学术同行评审中，随着AI工具普及，区分AI生成与人工撰写的评论变得关键。Sem-Detect通过分析评论中表达的观点和判断，而不仅仅是文字特征，帮助更准确地识别评审来源，保障评审过程的公正与透明。该方法的创新在于结合了语义层面的思想检测，显著提升了检测准确率。
why_it_matters_en: As AI tools become widespread in academic peer reviews, distinguishing AI-generated from human-written feedback becomes crucial. Sem-Detect improves authorship detection by analyzing expressed ideas and judgments beyond mere textual features, enhancing accuracy and ensuring fairness and transparency in the review process. Its innovation lies in integrating semantic-level claim analysis, substantially boosting detection performance.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Sem-Detect: Semantic Level Detection of AI Generated Peer-Reviews. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI被Gartner评为企业级代码智能代理领导者

summary_en: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with its Codex product recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一评价反映了OpenAI在企业级代码智能代理领域的技术领先和广泛应用能力，表明其产品Codex在创新和大规模部署方面表现卓越。
why_it_matters_en: This recognition reflects OpenAI’s technological leadership and wide adoption in the enterprise coding agent space, highlighting Codex’s excellence in innovation and large-scale deployment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI Named a Leader in Enterprise Coding Agents by Gartner. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: AdventHealth利用OpenAI推动整体护理发展

summary_zh: AdventHealth正在使用面向医疗的ChatGPT来简化工作流程，减少行政负担，从而让医护人员有更多时间专注于患者护理。
summary_en: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过应用OpenAI的ChatGPT，AdventHealth能够提升医疗效率，支持医护人员更好地关注患者的整体健康需求。
why_it_matters_en: By applying OpenAI's ChatGPT, AdventHealth enhances healthcare efficiency, allowing medical staff to better focus on the comprehensive health needs of patients.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列
title_en: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
summary_zh: Hugging Face 推出了 OlmoEarth v1.1，这是一个更高效的地球观测模型系列，旨在提升遥感数据处理和分析的性能。
summary_en: Hugging Face has released OlmoEarth v1.1, a more efficient family of Earth observation models designed to improve the performance of remote sensing data processing and analysis.
why_it_matters_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1 能帮助科研人员和相关行业更快更准确地分析卫星遥感数据，从而推动环境监测和地理信息系统的发展。
why_it_matters_en: OlmoEarth v1.1 helps researchers and industries analyze satellite remote sensing data faster and more accurately, advancing environmental monitoring and geographic information systems.

why_it_matters_zh: 重排序器可以帮助模型更准确地选择最佳答案，提升自然语言处理任务的表现。
why_it_matters_en: Rerankers help models select the best answers more accurately, enhancing performance in natural language processing tasks.
